Spacious Accommodation: Apartman Luka in Golubac offers a spacious apartment with two bedrooms, a living room, and a bathroom. The property includes a terrace and free WiFi, ensuring a comfortable stay.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, minibar, and TV. Free on-site private parking is available, and reception staff speak German, Croatian, and Romanian.
Local Attractions: Lepenski Vir is located 40 km away, and Vrsac Airport is 80 km from the property. Reception staff can assist with local activities and excursions.

Beachfront Location: Golubac Bay Apartment in Golubac offers direct beachfront access and stunning river views. Guests can relax on the terrace and enjoy the serene surroundings.
Spacious Accommodation: The apartment features two bedrooms and a bathroom, providing ample space for a comfortable stay. Parquet floors and soundproofing ensure a peaceful environment.
Modern Amenities: Equipped with air-conditioning, a fully fitted kitchen, and free WiFi, the apartment caters to all comfort needs. Additional amenities include a hairdryer, walk-in shower, and TV.
Local Attractions: Lepenski Vir is located 40 km away, offering cultural exploration. Vrsac Airport is 80 km from the property, providing convenient travel options.
